english: I lost my passport.
My phone is missing.
I can't find my wallet.
pinyin: Wǒ zhǎo bù dào wǒ de qiánbāo.
frTranslation: Je ne trouve plus mon portefeuille.

english: My bag was stolen.
pinyin: Wǒ de bāo bèi tōu le.

english: I need to report to the police.
frTranslation: Je dois faire un dépôt de plainte.

english: Where is the police station?
Can you help me find my lost item?
chinese: 你能帮我找一下丢失的东西吗？
pinyin: Nǐ néng bāng wǒ zhǎo yīxià diūshī de dōngxī ma?
frTranslation: Pouvez-vous m'aider à retrouver mon objet perdu ?

english: I lost my belongings.
Please help me.
I need to contact the embassy.
What should I do?
I lost my ID card.
My bag is gone.
I think it was pickpocketed.
pinyin: Wǒ juédé shì bèi pāshǒu tōu le.
frTranslation: Je pense qu'il a été volé par un pickpocket.

english: Where did you lose it?
Can I use your phone to call the police?
chinese: 请问我能用您的手机报警吗？
pinyin: Qǐngwèn wǒ néng yòng nín de shǒujī bàojǐng ma?
frTranslation: Puis-je utiliser votre téléphone pour appeler la police ?

english: I need to cancel my credit cards.
frTranslation: J'ai besoin de faire opposition sur mes cartes de crédit.

english: I lost my hotel key.
frTranslation: J'ai perdu la clé de ma chambre d'hôtel.

english: My luggage is missing at the airport.
chinese: 我的行李在机场不见了。
pinyin: Wǒ de xíngli zài jīchǎng bùjiàn le.
frTranslation: Mes bagages sont manquants à l'aéroport.

english: I need to file a report.
I need to describe what was lost.
chinese: 我需要描述丢失的物品。
pinyin: Wǒ xūyào miáoshù diūshī de wùpǐn.
frTranslation: Je dois décrire ce qui a été perdu.

english: It was a black backpack.
frTranslation: C'était un sac à dos noir.

english: There was a passport and wallet inside.
frTranslation: Il y avait un passeport et un portefeuille à l'intérieur.

english: I am a tourist and lost my documents.
pinyin: Wǒ shì yóukè, diū le zhèngjiàn.
frTranslation: Je suis touriste et j'ai perdu mes documents.

english: How do I get a replacement passport?
frTranslation: Comment obtenir un passeport de remplacement ?

english: I need to inform my bank.
Can you write down the details?
pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ xiě xià xiángxì xìnxī.

english: I lost my camera.
I need to call my hotel.
pinyin: Wǒ xūyào dǎ diànhuà gěi jiǔdiàn.

english: I need to make a statement.
